games.title: Neon Breach
games.summary: A browser-native arena FPS prototype with wave scoring, jump combat, distinct skitter/brute/warden enemy classes, and readable reactor/tower/cover landmarks for testing agent-built gameplay loops and browser smoke automation.
manualChecklist: Start the game and confirm pointer lock instructions are clear.
Use W/A/S/D and verify movement feels correct while navigating by the central reactor and quadrant towers.
Aim with mouse and fire with left click or F fallback.
Confirm drones spawn, move toward the player, and can be destroyed.
Confirm HUD score, wave, health, and heat values update.
Confirm the central reactor, colored quadrant towers, boundary walls, and cover are visible during combat.
Let enemies hit you and confirm restart flow works when health reaches zero.
nextIdeas: Add audio/menu polish with fire, hit, death, wave, damage, pause, and restart feedback.
Record automated 10-second gameplay videos in CI.

games.title: Void Garden
games.summary: A cursor-haunted greenhouse toy where spores orbit, a moon-mouth blinks, and the specimen log mutates when you feed the void.
manualChecklist: Open the greenhouse and confirm the overlay disappears.
Move the cursor and confirm the sigil tracks pointer position.
Press F and confirm petals/specimens/weirdness increase.
Press Space and confirm the whisper text changes.
Watch spores drift toward the cursor without frame drops.
Confirm the specimen log remains readable over the animated canvas.
nextIdeas: Add timed rituals with scoring and failure states.
Let specimens combine into named monstrosities.
Add generated synth chirps for feeding and moon blinks.

games.title: Signal Salvage
games.summary: A neon top-down extraction game where a salvage drone collects cyan signal cores, dodges red interference, and keeps the uplink alive until the timer hits zero.
manualChecklist: Start Signal Salvage and confirm the menu explains movement and pulse-scan controls.
Move with W/A/S/D or arrow keys and confirm the drone stays inside the arena bounds.
Collect cyan signal cores and confirm score, cores, difficulty, and signal values update.
Hit or force a red interference sentry and confirm signal damage plus hit counters update.
Press F near cores and confirm pulse-scan feedback appears.
Let the timer complete or use the test hook and confirm the extraction win state is readable.
Confirm smoke screenshot/video artifacts show the arena, HUD, drone, cores, and hazards.
nextIdeas: Add audio pings for pulse scans, core pickups, interference hits, and extraction complete.
Add drone upgrade choices between waves: wider pulse, stronger shield, faster thrusters.
Add local high score and score-per-minute efficiency summary.
Let future OpenClaw helpers run variant tuning passes using the deterministic test hooks.
